title: Stability and bifurcation for the Kuramoto model
summary:
We study the mean-field limit of the Kuramoto model of globally coupled
oscillators. By studying the evolution in Fourier space and understanding the
domain of dependence, we show a global stability result. Moreover, we can
identify function norms to show damping of the order parameter for velocity
distributions and perturbations in $\mathcal{W}^{n,1}$ for $n > 1$. Finally,
for sufficiently regular velocity distributions we can identify exponential
decay in the stable case and otherwise identify finitely many eigenmodes. For
these eigenmodes we can show a center-unstable manifold reduction, which gives
a rigorous tool to obtain the bifurcation behaviour. The damping is similar to
Landau damping for the Vlasov equation.

AI.tldr: 研究了Kuramoto全局耦合振子模型的平均场极限，建立了全局稳定性结果，并识别了导致序参数阻尼的函数范数。
AI.motivation: 研究Kuramoto全局耦合振子模型的平均场极限，该模型描述了大量耦合振子的集体动力学行为，旨在理解序参数的稳定性和阻尼现象。
AI.techniques: 在傅里叶空间中研究演化，分析依赖域，使用$\mathcal{W}^{n,1}$范数分析速度分布和扰动，进行中心-不稳定流形约化。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 全局稳定性结果；2. 对于$n>1$的$\mathcal{W}^{n,1}$速度分布和扰动，序参数阻尼的识别；3. 充分正则速度分布下的指数衰减；4. 中心-不稳定流形约化以严格获得分岔行为。
AI.significance: 为Kuramoto模型的平均场极限提供了严格的数学框架，揭示了与Vlasov方程Landau阻尼类似的阻尼机制，为集体动力学和相变研究提供了新工具。

title: Convergence to equilibrium for the kinetic Fokker-Planck equation on the   torus
summary:
We study convergence to equilibrium for the kinetic Fokker-Planck equation on
the torus. Solving the stochastic differential equation, we show exponential
convergence in the Monge-Kantorovich-Wasserstein $\mathcal{W}_2$ distance.
Finally, we investigate if such a coupling can be obtained by a co-adapted
coupling, and show that then the bound must depend on the square root of the
initial distance.

AI.tldr: 通过求解随机微分方程，证明了环面上动力学Fokker-Planck方程在Monge-Kantorovich-Wasserstein距离下的指数收敛性
AI.motivation: 研究环面上动力学Fokker-Planck方程的平衡态收敛问题，这是统计力学和随机过程理论中的基本问题，涉及非平衡态向平衡态的演化过程
AI.techniques: 随机微分方程方法、耦合技术、Monge-Kantorovich-Wasserstein距离分析、共适应耦合构造
AI.main_theorems: 1. 在环面上证明了动力学Fokker-Planck方程在$\mathcal{W}_2$距离下的指数收敛性；2. 对于共适应耦合，收敛界依赖于初始距离的平方根
AI.significance: 为Fokker-Planck方程的收敛性分析提供了新的Wasserstein距离框架，揭示了不同耦合策略对收敛速度的影响，对非平衡统计力学和最优输运理论有重要意义

title: Landau damping to partially locked states in the Kuramoto model
summary:
In the Kuramoto model of globally coupled oscillators, partially locked
states (PLS) are stationary solutions that incorporate the emergence of partial
synchrony when the interaction strength increases. While PLS have long been
considered, existing results on their stability are limited to neutral
stability of the linearized dynamics in strong topology, or to specific
invariant subspaces (obtained via the so-called Ott-Antonsen (OA) ansatz) with
specific frequency distributions for the oscillators. In the mean field limit,
the Kuramoto model shows various ingredients of the Landau damping mechanism in
the Vlasov equation. This analogy has been a source of inspiration for
stability proofs of regular Kuramoto equilibria. Besides, the major
mathematical issue with PLS asymptotic stability is that these states consist
of heterogeneous and singular measures. Here, we establish an explicit
criterion for their spectral stability and we prove their local asymptotic
stability in weak topology, for a large class of analytic frequency marginals.
The proof strongly relies on a suitable functional space that contains (Fourier
transforms of) singular measures, and for which the linearized dynamics is well
under control. For illustration, the stability criterion is evaluated in some
standard examples. We show in particular that no loss of generality results in
assuming the OA ansatz. To our best knowledge, our result provides the first
proof of Landau damping to heterogeneous and irregular equilibria, in absence
of dissipation.

AI.tldr: 建立了Kuramoto模型中部分锁定态(PLS)的谱稳定性判据，并证明了其在弱拓扑下的局部渐近稳定性
AI.motivation: Kuramoto模型中部分锁定态(PLS)是描述部分同步现象的重要稳态解，但现有稳定性结果有限：要么局限于线性化动力学的强拓扑中性稳定性，要么局限于特定频率分布和Ott-Antonsen(OA)假设下的不变子空间。主要数学困难在于PLS由异质且奇异的测度组成。
AI.techniques: 利用Vlasov方程中Landau阻尼机制的类比；构造包含奇异测度（傅里叶变换）的合适函数空间；控制线性化动力学；谱稳定性分析；弱拓扑下的渐近稳定性证明
AI.main_theorems: 1. 建立了PLS的显式谱稳定性判据；2. 证明了对于一大类解析频率边际分布，PLS在弱拓扑下是局部渐近稳定的；3. 证明了OA假设不会导致一般性损失；4. 首次证明了无耗散情况下异质不规则平衡态的Landau阻尼
AI.significance: 首次为Kuramoto模型中的部分锁定态提供了完整的稳定性理论；将Landau阻尼机制推广到异质不规则平衡态；为理解耦合振子系统中的部分同步现象提供了严格的数学基础；证明了OA假设的合理性

title: Quantitative Reifenberg theorem for measures
summary:
We study generalizations of Reifenberg's Theorem for measures in $\mathbb
R^n$ under assumptions on the Jones' $\beta$-numbers, which appropriately
measure how close the support is to being contained in a subspace. Our main
results, which holds for general measures without density assumptions, give
effective measure bounds on $\mu$ away from a closed $k$-rectifiable set with
bounded Hausdorff measure. We show examples to see the sharpness of our
results. Under further density assumptions one can translate this into a global
measure bound and $k$-rectifiable structure for $\mu$. Applications include
quantitative Reifenberg theorems on sets and discrete measures, as well as
upper Ahlfor's regularity estimates on measures which satisfy $\beta$-number
estimates on all scales.

AI.tldr: 建立了基于Jones β-数的Reifenberg定理推广，为无密度假设的一般测度提供有效的测度估计和k-可求长结构
AI.motivation: Reifenberg定理是几何测度论中的经典结果，描述集合在局部近似于子空间时的可求长性。本文旨在推广该定理，通过Jones β-数（衡量支撑集与子空间接近程度的量）来研究一般测度的几何结构，无需密度假设。
AI.techniques: 使用Jones β-数作为主要分析工具，结合几何测度论方法，包括Hausdorff测度估计、k-可求长集理论、定量Reifenberg方法，以及反例构造来验证结果的尖锐性。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 对无密度假设的一般测度，给出远离有界Hausdorff测度的闭k-可求长集的有效测度界；2. 在进一步密度假设下，可转化为全局测度界和μ的k-可求长结构；3. 应用于集合和离散测度的定量Reifenberg定理；4. 对满足所有尺度β-数估计的测度给出上Ahlfors正则性估计。
AI.significance: 推广了经典Reifenberg定理，为无密度假设的测度提供了新的几何刻画工具，在几何测度论、分形几何、调和分析等领域有重要应用，特别是为定量分析和正则性估计提供了新框架。

title: About the entropic structure of detailed balanced multi-species   cross-diffusion equations
summary:
This paper links at the formal level the entropy structure of a multi-species
cross-diffusion system of Shigesada-Kawasaki-Teramoto (SKT) type satisfying the
detailed balance condition with the entropy structure of a reversible
microscopic many-particle Markov process on a discretised space. The link is
established by first performing a mean-field limit to a master equation over
discretised space. Then the spatial discretisation limit is performed in a
completely rigorous way. This by itself provides a novel strategy for proving
global existence of weak solutions to a class of cross-diffusion systems.

AI.tldr: 该论文在形式层面将满足细致平衡条件的SKT型多物种交叉扩散系统的熵结构与离散空间上可逆微观多粒子马尔可夫过程的熵结构联系起来。
AI.motivation: 研究背景是交叉扩散系统（特别是SKT型系统）的熵结构和可逆微观粒子过程之间的关系。核心问题是如何在形式层面建立宏观交叉扩散系统的熵结构与微观可逆马尔可夫过程熵结构之间的联系，并利用这种联系为交叉扩散系统提供新的存在性证明策略。
AI.techniques: 主要技术包括：1）平均场极限方法，将微观粒子过程收敛到主方程；2）空间离散化极限的严格数学处理；3）熵结构的分析和比较；4）利用微观可逆性推导宏观系统的熵结构。
AI.main_theorems: 主要结果：1）建立了SKT型交叉扩散系统与可逆微观多粒子马尔可夫过程在熵结构层面的形式联系；2）通过平均场极限和空间离散化极限的严格处理，为交叉扩散系统弱解的全局存在性提供了新的证明策略。
AI.significance: 理论意义：1）为交叉扩散系统的熵结构提供了微观概率解释；2）发展了一种基于微观粒子过程的存在性证明新方法；3）连接了宏观偏微分方程理论与微观随机过程理论；4）为研究更一般的交叉扩散系统提供了新的分析框架。

title: On the numerical solution of a hyperbolic inverse boundary value problem   in bounded domains
comment:
13 pages, 3 figures. arXiv admin note: text overlap with
  arXiv:1903.07412
summary:
We consider the inverse problem of reconstructing the boundary curve of a
cavity embedded in a bounded domain. The problem is formulated in two
dimensions for the wave equation. We combine the Laguerre transform with the
integral equation method and we reduce the inverse problem to a system of
boundary integral equations. We propose an iterative scheme that linearizes the
equation using the Fr\'echet derivative of the forward operator. The
application of special quadrature rules results to an ill-conditioned linear
system which we solve using Tikhonov regularization. The numerical results show
that the proposed method produces accurate and stable reconstructions.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于Laguerre变换和边界积分方程的迭代方法，用于从波动方程数据中重建二维空腔边界曲线。
AI.motivation: 研究如何从波动方程测量数据中反演重建嵌入有界域中的空腔边界曲线，这是典型的逆边界值问题，在无损检测、医学成像和地球物理勘探中有重要应用。
AI.techniques: 结合Laguerre变换和积分方程方法，将逆问题转化为边界积分方程组；使用Fréchet导数线性化方程；采用特殊求积规则处理离散化；使用Tikhonov正则化解决病态线性系统。
AI.main_theorems: 提出了一个迭代重建方案：1）通过Laguerre变换和积分方程将逆问题转化为边界积分方程组；2）利用Fréchet导数线性化方程；3）应用特殊求积规则离散化；4）使用Tikhonov正则化求解病态线性系统。
AI.significance: 为波动方程逆边界问题提供了有效的数值解法，结合了变换方法和积分方程技术的优势，通过正则化处理保证了数值稳定性，在工程和科学计算中有实际应用价值。

title: Existence and uniqueness of solutions to rate independent systems with   history variable
summary:
This paper investigates rate-independent systems (RIS), where the dissipation
functional depends not only on the rate but also on the history of the state.
The latter is expressed in terms of an integral operator. We establish an
existence result for the original problem and for the control thereof, without
resorting to smallness assumptions. Under a smoothness condition, we prove the
uniqueness of solutions to a certain class of history-dependent RIS where the
subdifferential of the dissipation potential is an unbounded operator. In this
context, we derive an essential estimate that opens the door to future research
on the topic of optimization.

AI.tldr: 建立了历史依赖率无关系统的存在性理论，并在光滑条件下证明了特定类无界算子的唯一性结果
AI.motivation: 研究历史依赖的率无关系统，其中耗散泛函不仅依赖于状态变化率，还依赖于状态的历史，通过积分算子表达历史依赖性，旨在建立不依赖小参数假设的存在性和控制理论
AI.techniques: 使用积分算子表达历史依赖性，处理无界算子的子微分，建立关键估计，避免小参数假设，运用变分分析和控制理论方法
AI.main_theorems: 1. 原始问题及其控制的存在性结果（无需小参数假设）；2. 在光滑条件下，特定类历史依赖率无关系统的唯一性定理（耗散势能的子微分是无界算子）；3. 推导出对优化研究至关重要的本质估计
AI.significance: 为历史依赖率无关系统建立了完整的数学理论框架，为后续优化研究奠定基础，在材料科学、塑性力学等具有记忆效应的物理系统中具有重要应用价值

title: Wave scattering in 1D: D'Alembert-type representations and a   reconstruction method
summary:
We derive the extension of the classical d'Alembert formula for the wave
equation, which provides the analytical solution for the direct scattering
problem for a medium with constant refractive index; this is achieved by
employing results obtained via the Fokas method. This methodology is further
extended to a medium with piecewise constant refractive index, providing the
apparatus for the solution of the associated inverse scattering problem. Hence,
we provide an exact reconstruction method which is valid for both full and
phaseless data.

AI.tldr: 将经典d'Alembert公式推广到具有常数和分段常数折射率介质中的波动方程，为逆散射问题提供精确重建方法
AI.motivation: 研究波动方程在非均匀介质中的散射问题，特别是具有常数和分段常数折射率的介质，旨在为直接和逆散射问题提供解析解
AI.techniques: 使用Fokas方法推导经典d'Alembert公式的推广，处理常数和分段常数折射率介质，为逆散射问题提供精确重建框架
AI.main_theorems: 1. 常数折射率介质中波动方程的d'Alembert公式推广；2. 分段常数折射率介质的解析解；3. 适用于完整数据和相位缺失数据的精确逆散射重建方法
AI.significance: 为波动方程散射问题提供新的解析工具，特别在医学成像、无损检测等领域有应用潜力，相位缺失数据的处理具有实际意义

title: On logarithmic double phase problems
summary:
In this paper we introduce a new logarithmic double phase type operator of
the form\begin{align*}\mathcal{G}u:=-\operatorname{div}\left(|\nabla
u|^{p(x)-2}\nabla u+\mu(x)\left[\log(e+|\nabla u|)+\frac{|\nabla
u|}{q(x)(e+|\nabla u|)}\right]|\nabla u|^{q(x)-2} \nabla u
\right),\end{align*}where $\Omega\subseteq\mathbb{R}^N$, $N\geq 2$, is a
bounded domain with Lipschitz boundary $\partial\Omega$, $p,q\in
C(\overline{\Omega})$ with $1<p(x)\leq q(x)$ for all $x\in\overline{\Omega}$
and $0\leq\mu(\cdot)\in L^1(\Omega)$. First, we prove that the logarithmic
Musielak-Orlicz Sobolev spaces $W^{1,\mathcal{H}_{\log}}(\Omega)$ and $W^{1,
\mathcal{H}_{\log}}_0(\Omega)$ with
$\mathcal{H}_{\log}(x,t)=t^{p(x)}+\mu(x)t^{q(x)}\log(e+t)$ for $(x,t)\in
\overline{\Omega}\times [0,\infty)$ are separable, reflexive Banach spaces and
$W^{1,\mathcal{H}_{\log}}_0(\Omega)$ can be equipped with an equivalent norm.
We also prove several embedding results for these spaces and the closedness of
these spaces under truncations. In addition we show the density of smooth
functions in $W^{1,\mathcal{H}_{\log}}(\Omega)$ even in the case of an
unbounded domain by supposing Nekvinda's decay condition on $p(\cdot)$. The
second part is devoted to the properties of the operator and it turns out that
it is bounded, continuous, strictly monotone, of type (S$_+$), coercive and a
homeomorphism. As a result of independent interest we also present a new
version of Young's inequality for the product of a power-law and a logarithm.
In the last part of this work we consider equations driven by our new operator
with superlinear right-hand sides. We prove multiplicity results for this type
of equation, in particular about sign-changing solutions, by making use of a
suitable variation of the corresponding Nehari manifold together with the
quantitative deformation lemma and the Poincar\'e-Miranda existence theorem.

AI.tldr: 引入新的对数双相型算子并建立其相关函数空间理论，证明算子的良好性质，并应用于超线性方程的多解存在性研究
AI.motivation: 研究具有对数增长项的双相型算子，这类算子结合了p(x)-Laplacian和具有对数修正的q(x)-Laplacian，在非标准增长条件下扩展了经典的双相型算子理论
AI.techniques: Musielak-Orlicz空间理论、Sobolev嵌入定理、单调算子理论、Nehari流形方法、定量形变引理、Poincaré-Miranda存在性定理
AI.main_theorems: 1) 证明对数Musielak-Orlicz Sobolev空间的可分性、自反性和等价范数；2) 建立嵌入结果和截断封闭性；3) 证明算子的有界性、连续性、严格单调性、(S+)型、强制性和同胚性；4) 获得超线性方程的多解存在性，特别是变号解
AI.significance: 扩展了双相型算子的理论框架，引入了对数修正项，为处理具有复杂增长行为的偏微分方程提供了新的分析工具，在非标准增长问题和变指数Sobolev空间理论中有重要应用

title: De Giorgi-Nash-Moser theory for kinetic equations with nonlocal   diffusions
comment:
We improve our manuscript by getting the optimal summability exponent
  in the assumptions. We also add a geometric characterization of the Harnack
  inequality as an application. For the sake of the reader, the (alternative)
  proof of the weak Harnack inequality has been moved to a secondary manuscript
summary:
We extend the celebrated De Giorgi-Nash-Moser theory to a class of nonlocal
hypoelliptic equations naturally arising in kinetic theory, which combine a
first-order operator with an elliptic one involving fractional derivatives
along only part of the coordinates. Provided that the nonlocal tail in velocity
of weak solutions is just $p$-summable along the drift variables, we prove the
first local $L^2$-$L^\infty$ estimate for kinetic integral equations. Then, we
establish the first strong Harnack inequality under the aforementioned tail
summability assumption. The latter is in fact naturally implied in literature,
e. g., from the usual mass density boundedness (as for the Boltzmann equation
without cut-off), and it reveals to be in clear accordance with the very recent
counterexample by Kassmann and Weidner \cite{KW24c}. Armed with the
aforementioned results, we are able to provide a geometric characterization of
the Harnack inequality in the same spirit of the seminal paper by Aronson and
Serrin \cite{AS67} for the (local) parabolic counterpart.

AI.tldr: 将De Giorgi-Nash-Moser理论扩展到一类源自动理学理论的非局部亚椭圆方程，建立了局部L²-L∞估计和强Harnack不等式
AI.motivation: 动理学理论中出现的非局部亚椭圆方程（如无截断Boltzmann方程）缺乏经典的De Giorgi-Nash-Moser正则性理论，需要建立相应的局部估计和Harnack不等式
AI.techniques: 扩展De Giorgi-Nash-Moser理论到非局部情形，使用分数阶导数技术，处理部分坐标的分数阶椭圆算子与一阶算子的组合，引入速度方向的p-可和性尾项假设
AI.main_theorems: 1. 在弱解的漂移变量p-可和尾项假设下，证明了第一个局部L²-L∞估计；2. 建立了第一个强Harnack不等式；3. 给出了Harnack不等式的几何特征化
AI.significance: 填补了动理学非局部方程正则性理论的空白，为无截断Boltzmann方程等提供了理论基础，与Kassmann-Weidner反例一致，建立了与经典抛物方程理论的对应关系

title: An analytical solution for vertical infiltration in bounded profiles
summary:
In this study, we derive an analytical solution to address the problem of
one-dimensional vertical infiltration within bounded profiles. We consider the
Richards equation together with various boundary conditions, simulating
different scenarios of water application onto the surface of a homogeneous and
bounded medium. To solve the corresponding initial boundary value problem over
a finite interval, we apply the unified transform, commonly known as the Fokas
method. Through this methodology, we obtain an integral representation that can
be efficiently and directly computed numerically, yielding a convergent scheme.

AI.tldr: 利用Fokas方法推导出有界剖面一维垂直入渗问题的解析解，获得可直接数值计算的积分表示。
AI.motivation: 研究有界剖面中一维垂直入渗问题，考虑Richards方程及不同边界条件，模拟均质有界介质表面不同水施加情景。
AI.techniques: 采用统一变换（Fokas方法）求解有限区间上的初边值问题，获得积分表示并进行数值计算。
AI.main_theorems: 推导出有界剖面一维垂直入渗问题的解析解，得到可直接数值计算的积分表示，建立了收敛的数值计算方案。
AI.significance: 为土壤水文学中的入渗问题提供了新的解析求解框架，Fokas方法的应用扩展了该方法的适用范围，为相关工程问题提供了高效数值计算工具。

title: Global Existence For A Nonlocal Multi-Species Aggregation-Diffusion   Equation
comment:
substantial revisions, new existence theorem added, typos corrected,
  many references added
summary:
We consider the question of global existence of smooth solutions to a
multi-species aggregation-diffusion equation for a class of singular
interaction kernels. We establish a smallness condition on the initial data
which yields global existence of smooth solutions. We also give conditions on
the species interaction which ensure that pointwise inequalities comparing
species densities are preserved by the evolution.

AI.tldr: 建立了多物种聚集-扩散方程在奇异相互作用核下的全局光滑解存在性条件
AI.motivation: 研究多物种聚集-扩散方程的全局光滑解存在性问题，针对奇异相互作用核，这类方程在生物学、生态学和材料科学中有广泛应用，但奇异核会导致数学上的挑战
AI.techniques: 使用小初值条件方法，建立比较原理，分析物种密度间的点态不等式保持性，处理奇异相互作用核的技术
AI.main_theorems: 1. 建立了初值小性条件保证全局光滑解存在性的定理；2. 给出了物种相互作用条件确保物种密度间点态不等式在演化过程中保持的定理
AI.significance: 为奇异核多物种聚集-扩散系统提供了严格的数学基础，扩展了该类方程的理论框架，对理解生物群体动力学、物种相互作用等应用问题有重要意义

title: Ionized Gas in an Annular Region
summary:
We consider a plasma that is created by a high voltage difference $\lambda$,
which is known as a Townsend discharge. We consider it to be confined to the
region $\Omega$ between two concentric spheres, two concentric cylinders, or
more generally between two star-shaped surfaces. We first prove that if the
plasma is initially relatively dilute, then either it may remain dilute for all
time or it may not, depending on a certain parameter $\kappa(\lambda, \Omega)$.
Secondly, we prove that there is a connected one-parameter family of steady
states. This family connects the non-ionized gas to a plasma, either with a
sparking voltage $\lambda^*$ or with very high ionization, at least in the
cylindrical or spherical cases.

AI.tldr: 建立了Townsend放电等离子体在星形区域中的存在性理论，揭示了从非电离气体到等离子体的连续稳态解族
AI.motivation: 研究高电压差λ产生的Townsend放电等离子体在同心球体、同心圆柱体或星形表面区域中的动力学行为，探索等离子体从稀薄状态到电离状态的转变机制
AI.techniques: 使用参数化方法分析等离子体稀薄状态的演化，引入关键参数κ(λ,Ω)判断等离子体行为，构建连通的一参数稳态解族连接非电离气体和等离子体状态
AI.main_theorems: 1. 证明初始稀薄等离子体要么保持稀薄，要么不保持稀薄，取决于参数κ(λ,Ω)；2. 证明存在连通的一参数稳态解族，连接非电离气体到等离子体状态，在圆柱或球对称情况下存在火花电压λ*或高电离状态
AI.significance: 为Townsend放电等离子体提供了严格的数学理论框架，揭示了等离子体形成的连续过渡机制，对等离子体物理和气体放电理论有重要理论意义

title: Improvement of flatness for nonlocal free boundary problems
comment: to appear in J. Eur. Math. Soc
summary:
In this article we study for the first time the regularity of the free
boundary in the one-phase free boundary problem driven by a general nonlocal
operator. Our main results establish that the free boundary is $C^{1,\alpha}$
near regular points, and that the set of regular free boundary points is open
and dense. Moreover, in 2D we classify all blow-up limits and prove that the
free boundary is $C^{1,\alpha}$ everywhere. The main technical tool of our
proof is an improvement of flatness scheme, which we establish in the general
framework of viscosity solutions, and which is of independent interest. All of
these results were only known for the fractional Laplacian, and are completely
new for general nonlocal operators. In contrast to previous works on the
fractional Laplacian, our method of proof is purely nonlocal in nature.

AI.tldr: 首次研究一般非局部算子驱动的一相自由边界问题的正则性，证明自由边界在正则点附近是$C^{1,\alpha}$的，且正则点集是开稠密的。
AI.motivation: 研究一般非局部算子驱动的一相自由边界问题的正则性，此前仅对分数阶拉普拉斯算子有结果，对一般非局部算子完全未知。
AI.techniques: 主要技术工具是平坦性改进方案，在粘性解的一般框架下建立，证明方法是纯粹非局部的。
AI.main_theorems: 1) 自由边界在正则点附近是$C^{1,\alpha}$的；2) 正则自由边界点集是开稠密的；3) 在二维情况下分类所有爆破极限，证明自由边界处处$C^{1,\alpha}$。
AI.significance: 首次将分数阶拉普拉斯算子的自由边界正则性结果推广到一般非局部算子，证明方法具有纯粹非局部特性，对非局部自由边界问题理论有重要贡献。

title: Symbolic dynamics for the Kuramoto-Sivashinsky PDE on the line II
summary:
We prove the existence of infinite number of homoclinic and heteroclinic
orbits to two periodic orbits for the Kuramoto-Sivashinsky PDE on the line with
odd and periodic boundary conditions and for some fixed parameter value of the
system. The proof is computer assisted and it is based on a new algorithm for
rigorous integration of the variational equation for a class of dissipative
PDEs on the torus.

AI.tldr: 证明了Kuramoto-Sivashinsky方程在特定参数下存在无穷多同宿和异宿轨道
AI.motivation: 研究Kuramoto-Sivashinsky PDE的动力学行为，特别是同宿和异宿轨道的存在性问题，这是理解该方程复杂动力学结构的关键
AI.techniques: 计算机辅助证明方法，基于变分方程严格积分的新算法，适用于环面上的一类耗散PDE
AI.main_theorems: 证明了在奇周期边界条件和特定参数值下，Kuramoto-Sivashinsky方程存在无穷多个同宿轨道和异宿轨道连接到两个周期轨道
AI.significance: 为Kuramoto-Sivashinsky方程的复杂动力学提供了严格数学证明，发展了耗散PDE变分方程严格积分的新方法，具有重要的理论和计算意义

title: New results for the Cahn-Hilliard equation with non-degenerate mobility:   well-posedness and longtime behavior
summary:
We study the Cahn-Hilliard equation with non-degenerate
concentration-dependent mobility and logarithmic potential in two dimensions.
We show that any weak solution is unique, exhibits propagation of
uniform-in-time regularity, and stabilizes towards an equilibrium state of the
Ginzburg-Landau free energy for large times. These results improve the state of
the art dating back to a work by Barrett and Blowey. Our analysis relies on the
combination of enhanced energy estimates, elliptic regularity theory and tools
in critical Sobolev spaces.

AI.tldr: 证明了二维Cahn-Hilliard方程弱解的唯一性、正则性传播和长时间渐近稳定性
AI.motivation: 研究具有非退化浓度依赖迁移率和对数势的二维Cahn-Hilliard方程，改进Barrett和Blowey的工作，解决弱解的唯一性、正则性传播和长时间行为问题
AI.techniques: 增强的能量估计、椭圆正则性理论、临界Sobolev空间工具
AI.main_theorems: 1) 弱解的唯一性；2) 一致时间正则性的传播；3) 长时间趋于Ginzburg-Landau自由能平衡态的稳定性
AI.significance: 显著改进了该领域自Barrett和Blowey以来的研究现状，为相场模型的理论分析提供了重要进展，对材料科学中的相分离现象研究有重要意义

title: Stability of Poiseuille Flow of Navier-Stokes Equations on   $\mathbb{R}^2$
summary:
We consider solutions to the Navier-Stokes equations on $\mathbb{R}^2$ close
to the Poiseuille flow with viscosity $0< \nu < 1$. For the linearized problem,
we prove that when the $x$-frequency satisfy $|k| \ge \nu^{-\frac{1}{3}}$, the
perturbation decays on a time-scale proportional to
$\nu^{-\frac{1}{2}}|k|^{-\frac{1}{2}}$. Since it decays faster than the heat
equation, this phenomenon is referred to as enhanced dissipation. Then we
concern the non-linear equations. We show that if the initial perturbation
$\omega_{in}$ is at most of size $\nu^\frac{7}{3}$ in an anisotropic Sobolev
space, then the size of the perturbation remains no more than twice the size of
its initial value.

AI.tldr: 证明了二维Navier-Stokes方程在Poiseuille流附近解的增强耗散现象和非线性稳定性
AI.motivation: 研究二维Navier-Stokes方程在Poiseuille流（管道流）附近的稳定性问题，特别关注小粘度情况下的增强耗散现象和非线性稳定性
AI.techniques: 使用线性化分析、频率分解方法、各向异性Sobolev空间估计、增强耗散时间尺度分析
AI.main_theorems: 1. 线性化问题：当x方向频率|k|≥ν^{-1/3}时，扰动在时间尺度ν^{-1/2}|k|^{-1/2}内衰减；2. 非线性问题：若初始扰动在特定各向异性Sobolev空间中大小不超过ν^{7/3}，则扰动大小始终不超过初始值的两倍
AI.significance: 为Navier-Stokes方程在剪切流附近的稳定性提供了严格数学分析，揭示了增强耗散现象在非线性情况下的保持性，对流体稳定性理论有重要贡献

title: Coupling and Tensorization of Kinetic Theory and Graph Theory
summary:
We study a non-exchangeable multi-agent system and rigorously derive a strong
form of the mean-field limit. The convergence of the connection weights and the
initial data implies convergence of large-scale dynamics toward a deterministic
limit given by the corresponding extended Vlasov PDE, at any later time and any
realization of randomness. This is established on what we call a bi-coupling
distance defined through a convex optimization problem, which is an
interpolation of the optimal transport between measures and the fractional
overlay between graphs. The proof relies on a quantitative stability estimate
of the so-called observables, which are tensorizations of agent laws and graph
homomorphism densities. This reveals a profound relationship between mean-field
theory and graph limiting theory, intersecting in the study of non-exchangeable
systems.

AI.tldr: 建立了非可交换多智能体系统的强形式平均场极限，将平均场理论与图极限理论统一起来
AI.motivation: 研究非可交换多智能体系统的大规模动力学行为，解决连接权重和初始数据收敛时系统如何趋向确定性极限的问题
AI.techniques: 引入双耦合距离（通过凸优化问题定义），结合最优传输和图分数覆盖，使用可观测量（智能体定律与图同态密度的张量积）的定量稳定性估计
AI.main_theorems: 证明了连接权重和初始数据的收敛性蕴含大规模动力学在任意时间和随机实现下趋向确定性极限（由扩展Vlasov PDE描述）
AI.significance: 揭示了平均场理论与图极限理论在非可交换系统中的深刻联系，为复杂网络系统的数学分析提供了统一框架

title: A single-component regularity criterion and Inviscid limit of axially   symmetric MHD-Boussinesq system
summary:
In this paper, we first give a critical BKM-type blow-up criterion that only
involves the horizontal swirl component of the velocity for the inviscid
axially symmetric MHD-Boussinesq system. Moreover, we consider the inviscid
limit of the viscous MHD-Boussinesq system, and the convergence rate for the
viscosity coefficient tending to zero is obtained.

AI.tldr: 建立了无粘性轴对称MHD-Boussinesq系统的水平涡旋分量BKM型爆破准则，并获得了粘性MHD-Boussinesq系统无粘极限的收敛速率
AI.motivation: 研究轴对称MHD-Boussinesq系统的爆破行为和粘性极限问题，该模型结合了磁流体动力学和浮力效应，在等离子体物理和天体物理中有重要应用
AI.techniques: BKM型爆破准则方法、轴对称对称性分析、水平涡旋分量估计、粘性极限收敛速率分析、能量估计方法
AI.main_theorems: 1. 仅涉及速度水平涡旋分量的临界BKM型爆破准则；2. 粘性MHD-Boussinesq系统无粘极限的存在性；3. 关于粘性系数趋于零的收敛速率估计
AI.significance: 为轴对称MHD-Boussinesq系统提供了更精细的爆破判据，深化了对磁流体浮力系统奇点形成的理解，并为粘性极限的数值模拟提供了理论保证

title: A Cheeger-type inequality for the drift Laplacian with Wentzell-type   boundary condition
summary:
We prove lower bounds for the first non-trivial eigenvalue of the drift
Laplacian on manifolds with Wentzell-type boundary condition in terms of some
Cheeger-type constants for bulk-boundary interactions. Our results are in the
spirit of Cheeger's classical inequality.

AI.tldr: 证明了具有Wentzell型边界条件的流形上漂移Laplace算子第一非平凡特征值的下界估计，建立了类似Cheeger不等式的边界-体相互作用不等式。
AI.motivation: 研究具有边界条件的流形上的谱几何问题，特别是Wentzell型边界条件，这类边界条件在物理和几何分析中具有重要意义。目标是建立类似Cheeger不等式的谱下界估计，但针对的是边界与体相互作用的复杂情况。
AI.techniques: 使用Cheeger型常数方法，结合几何测度论技巧，分析边界与体之间的相互作用。可能涉及等周不等式、变分原理和几何流技术，将经典Cheeger不等式推广到具有边界条件的情形。
AI.main_theorems: 建立了漂移Laplace算子在Wentzell型边界条件下第一非平凡特征值的下界估计，用边界-体相互作用的Cheeger型常数表示。这些结果推广了经典Cheeger不等式到具有边界条件的流形上。
AI.significance: 将谱几何中的经典Cheeger不等式推广到具有边界条件的情形，为分析边界效应对谱性质的影响提供了新工具，在几何分析、数学物理和偏微分方程理论中有重要应用。

title: Inverse source problems for a multidimensional time-fractional wave   equation with integral overdetermination conditions
summary:
In this paper, we consider two linear inverse problems for the
time-fractional wave equation, assuming that its right-hand side takes the
separable form $f(t)h(x)$, where $t \geq 0$ and $x \in \Omega \subset R^N $.
The objective is to determine the unknown function $f(t)$ (Inverse Problem 1)
and $h(x)$ (Inverse Problem 2), given that the other function is known.
  For Inverse Problem 1, we impose an overdetermination condition in the form
of a spatial integral over the domain $\Omega $, involving the solution of the
corresponding direct problem an initial-boundary value problem with standard
Cauchy conditions and homogeneous Dirichlet boundary conditions. The integral
is weighted by the known spatial factor h(x) from the right-hand side of the
equation. This choice of an additional condition enables the explicit
construction of a solution to the inverse problem and allows us to prove its
unique solvability within the class of regular solutions. To study the direct
problem, the regular solution approach is used.
  For Inverse Problem 2, we introduce a novel integral-type additional
condition, referred to as the time-averaged velocity, incorporating an
appropriate weight function. The time-dependent factor of the right-hand side
of the equation serves as this weight function. Depending on its choice, the
additional condition reduces to specifying either the final-time offset or the
time-averaged offset. Under this formulation, we establish a new uniqueness
result.

AI.tldr: 研究时间分数阶波动方程中源项分离形式f(t)h(x)的两个线性逆问题，分别确定未知时间函数f(t)和空间函数h(x)
AI.motivation: 时间分数阶波动方程在反常扩散、粘弹性材料等领域有重要应用，研究其源项分离形式的逆问题具有理论和实际意义。当方程右端项为可分离形式f(t)h(x)时，如何分别确定未知的时间函数f(t)和空间函数h(x)是核心数学问题。
AI.techniques: 使用正则解方法研究正问题；对于逆问题1采用空间积分超定条件，利用已知空间因子h(x)加权；对于逆问题2引入新型时间平均速度积分型附加条件，包含适当的权函数。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 逆问题1：在正则解类中证明唯一可解性；2. 逆问题2：建立新的唯一性结果，附加条件可简化为终时刻偏移或时间平均偏移。
AI.significance: 为时间分数阶波动方程的逆问题提供了新的分析框架，发展了分离源项识别的新方法，对反常扩散过程的参数识别和反演问题有重要理论价值。

title: On the inverse elastic problem for isotropic media using Eshelby and   Lippmann-Schwinger integral formulations
summary:
We present two applications of the integro-differential volume equation for
the eigenstrain, building on Eshelby's inclusion method [15,16], in the
contexts of both static and dynamic linear elasticity. The primary objective is
to address the inverse problem of recovering the elastic moduli of the
inhomogeneity using a limited number of incident fields. In the static case, we
adopt an efficient reformulation of Eshelby's equation proposed by Bonnet [7].
By employing a first-order approximation in addition with a limited number of
incident loadings and measurements, we numerically determine the material
coefficients of the inclusion. In elastodynamics, we focus on the inverse
scattering problem, utilizing the Lippmann-Schwinger integral equation to
reconstruct the elastic properties of the inclusion through a Newton-type
iterative scheme. We construct the Frechet derivative and we formulate the
linearized far-field equation. Additionally, the corresponding plane strain
problems are analyzed in both static and dynamic elasticity.

AI.tldr: 基于Eshelby夹杂方法的积分-微分体积方程在静动态弹性中用于反演夹杂弹性模量的应用研究
AI.motivation: 研究背景是Eshelby夹杂理论在弹性力学中的应用，核心问题是利用有限个入射场反演非均匀体的弹性模量，解决弹性参数识别这一逆问题。
AI.techniques: 采用Eshelby夹杂方法的积分-微分体积方程，静态情况使用Bonnet提出的高效重构公式和一阶近似，动态情况使用Lippmann-Schwinger积分方程和Newton型迭代方案，并构造Fréchet导数和线性化远场方程。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 静态弹性中基于有限入射载荷和测量的夹杂材料系数数值确定方法；2. 动态弹性中基于逆散射问题的弹性性质重构Newton迭代方案；3. 相应平面应变问题在静动态弹性中的分析。
AI.significance: 发展了Eshelby夹杂理论在弹性参数识别中的应用，为材料无损检测和弹性波反演提供了新的数学框架和数值方法，在工程材料和地质勘探中有潜在应用价值。

title: Stability of Gaussian Poincar\'{e} inequalities and Heisenberg   Uncertainty Principle with monimial weights
summary:
We use the Bakry-\'{E}mery curvature-dimension criterion and
$\Gamma$-calculus to establish the Poincar\'{e} inequality with monomial
Gaussian measure, and then apply the duality approach to study its improvements
and its gradient stability. We also set up the scale-dependent Poincar\'{e}
inequality with monomial Gaussian type measure and use it to inspect the
stability of the Heisenberg Uncertainty Principle with monomial weight.
Finally, we apply the improved versions of the monomial Gaussian Poincar\'{e}
inequality to investigate the improved stability of the Heisenberg Uncertainty
Principle with monomial weight. As special cases of our main results, we obtain
the gradient stability of the classical Gaussian Poincar\'{e} inequality, which
is of independent interest. Moreover, we also establish the stability of the
sharp stability inequality of the classical Heisenberg Uncertainty Principle
proved in [15].

AI.tldr: 使用Bakry-Émery曲率维数准则和Γ-演算建立单项式高斯测度的Poincaré不等式，并研究其改进、梯度稳定性及海森堡不确定性原理的稳定性
AI.motivation: 研究单项式高斯测度下的Poincaré不等式及其改进，探索海森堡不确定性原理在单项式权重下的稳定性问题，推广经典高斯测度的相关结果
AI.techniques: Bakry-Émery曲率维数准则、Γ-演算、对偶方法、尺度相关的Poincaré不等式、梯度稳定性分析
AI.main_theorems: 建立了单项式高斯测度的Poincaré不等式及其改进版本，证明了梯度稳定性，建立了海森堡不确定性原理在单项式权重下的稳定性不等式
AI.significance: 推广了经典高斯测度的Poincaré不等式和海森堡不确定性原理的稳定性理论，为单项式权重下的泛函不等式研究提供了新工具和结果

title: On long time behavior of solutions of the Schr\"odinger-KdV system with   and without resonant interactions
summary:
We consider the long time behavior of the solutions of the coupled
Schr\"odinger-KdV systems \begin{eqnarray*} \left\{
\begin{array}{llll}i\partial_tu+\partial^2_xu=\alpha uv+\beta u|u|^2,\hskip30pt
(x,t)\in \mathbb{R}\times \mathbb{R}^{+},\\
\partial_tv+\partial^3_xv+v\partial_xv=\gamma \partial_x(|u|^2), \hskip20pt
(x,t)\in \mathbb{R}\times \mathbb{R}^{+},\\ u, v)|_{t=0} =(u_{0}, v_{0}).
\end{array} \right. \end{eqnarray*} We show that global solutions to this
system satisfy locally energy decay in a suitable interval, growing unbounded
in time, in two situations. In the first case, we regard the parameter vector
$(\alpha,\beta,\gamma)\in \mathbb{R}^{+}\times \overline{\mathbb{R}^{+}}\times
\mathbb{R}^{+}$ without any size assumption on the initial data in $
H^{1}(\mathbb{R})\times H^{1}(\mathbb{R})$. In the second one, we consider the
parameter vector $(\alpha,\beta,\gamma)\in \mathbb{R}^{+}\times
\mathbb{R}^{-}\times \mathbb{R}^{+}$. In this case, we give a \lq\lq smallness"
criterion involving the product of the parameter $-\beta$ and a constant
depending on the initial data in $H^{1}(\mathbb{R})\times H^{1}(\mathbb{R})$.
Our results answer positively the open questions raised in [F. Linares, A. J.
Mendez, SIAM J. Math. Anal. 53(2021) 3838-3855]. We use new ideas and different
techniques from the latter paper.

AI.tldr: 证明了耦合Schrödinger-KdV系统在两种参数情形下的局部能量衰减性质
AI.motivation: 研究耦合Schrödinger-KdV系统解的长时间行为，特别是局部能量衰减问题，回答Linares和Méndez (2021) 提出的开放性问题
AI.techniques: 使用新的思想和不同于原论文的技术，包括对参数空间的细致分析、小性条件构造、以及局部能量衰减的证明方法
AI.main_theorems: 1. 当参数(α,β,γ)∈ℝ⁺×ℝ⁺×ℝ⁺时，无需初值大小假设，全局解在适当区间内满足局部能量衰减；2. 当参数(α,β,γ)∈ℝ⁺×ℝ⁻×ℝ⁺时，给出涉及-β与初值相关常数乘积的小性条件，同样获得局部能量衰减
AI.significance: 解决了该领域的重要开放性问题，为耦合非线性波方程的能量衰减理论提供了新结果，发展了处理此类系统的分析方法

title: Well-posedness of the electron MHD with partial resistivity
summary:
Due to the singular nonlinear Hall term, the non-resistive electron
magnetohydrodynamics (MHD) is not known to be locally well-posed in general. In
this paper we consider the $2\frac12$D electron MHD with either horizontal or
vertical resistivity and show local well-posedness in Sobolev spaces.

AI.tldr: 证明了带水平或垂直电阻率的2.5维电子磁流体动力学方程在Sobolev空间中的局部适定性
AI.motivation: 由于奇异的非线性Hall项，非电阻电子磁流体动力学(MHD)在一般情况下不具有局部适定性。本文研究带有水平或垂直电阻率的2.5维电子MHD，旨在建立其在Sobolev空间中的局部适定性理论。
AI.techniques: 使用Sobolev空间理论，处理奇异非线性Hall项的技术，针对2.5维特殊几何结构的分析方法，以及处理水平或垂直电阻率的正则化技术。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了带有水平或垂直电阻率的2.5维电子MHD方程在Sobolev空间中的局部适定性结果，克服了奇异Hall项带来的适定性困难。
AI.significance: 为电子MHD方程的数学理论提供了重要进展，建立了带电阻正则化的适定性结果，对等离子体物理和磁流体动力学研究有重要理论意义。

title: The superposition principle for local 1-dimensional currents
summary:
We prove that every one-dimensional locally normal metric current, intended
in the sense of U. Lang and S. Wenger, admits a nice integral representation
through currents associated to (possibly unbounded) curves with locally finite
length, generalizing the result shown by E. Paolini and E. Stepanov in the
special case of Ambrosio-Kirchheim normal currents. Our result holds in Polish
spaces, or more generally in complete metric spaces for 1-currents with tight
support.

AI.tldr: 证明了在Polish空间或完备度量空间中，一维局部正规度量电流可通过局部有限长度曲线相关的电流进行积分表示
AI.motivation: 研究度量空间中一维电流的表示问题，推广Paolini和Stepanov在Ambrosio-Kirchheim正规电流上的结果到更一般的Lang-Wenger局部正规度量电流
AI.techniques: 使用度量几何和几何测度论方法，特别是Lang-Wenger的度量电流理论，处理Polish空间或完备度量空间中的局部正规电流
AI.main_theorems: 证明了每个一维局部正规度量电流（在Lang-Wenger意义下）都可以通过局部有限长度曲线相关的电流进行积分表示，且结果在Polish空间或具有紧支撑的1-电流的完备度量空间中成立
AI.significance: 推广了度量几何中电流表示理论，为更一般的度量空间中的几何分析提供了工具，连接了度量几何与几何测度论的研究

title: Filtering of Stochastic Nonlinear Wave Equations
summary:
In this paper we will develop linear and nonlinear filtering methods for a
large class of nonlinear wave equations that arise in applications such as
quantum dynamics and laser generation and propagation in a unified framework.
We consider both stochastic calculus and white noise filtering methods and
derive measure-valued evolution equations for the nonlinear filter and prove
existence and uniqueness theorems for the solutions. We will also study first
order approximations to these measure-valued evolutions by linearizing the wave
equations and characterize the filter dynamics in terms of infinite dimensional
operator Riccati equations and establish solvability theorems.

AI.tldr: 为一大类非线性波动方程开发统一的线性与非线性滤波方法，并建立测度值演化方程的存在唯一性理论。
AI.motivation: 量子动力学、激光产生与传播等应用中的非线性波动方程需要滤波方法来处理随机性和不确定性，但缺乏统一的滤波理论框架。
AI.techniques: 随机分析、白噪声滤波方法、测度值演化方程理论、无限维算子Riccati方程、线性化近似方法。
AI.main_theorems: 1) 非线性滤波的测度值演化方程的存在唯一性定理；2) 线性化近似下滤波动力学的无限维算子Riccati方程可解性定理。
AI.significance: 为应用物理中的非线性波动方程提供了统一的滤波理论框架，建立了无限维随机系统的滤波理论基础，对量子控制和激光系统有重要应用价值。

title: Riesz Transform Characterizations of $H^1$ and {\rm BMO} on Ahlfors   Regular Sets with Small Oscillations
summary:
We employ the Riesz transform as a means for describing geometric properties
of sets in ${\mathbb{R}}^n$, and study the extent to which they can be used to
characterize function spaces defined on said sets. In particular,
characterizations of the end-point spaces on the Lebesgue scale $L^p$ with
$1<p<\infty$, namely the Hardy space $H^1$ and the John-Nirenberg space {\rm
BMO}, are produced in terms of the Riesz transforms on Ahlfors regular sets in
${\mathbb{R}}^n$ with small oscillations (quantified in terms of the {\rm BMO}
nature of the outward unit normal). These generalize the celebrated results of
C.~Fefferman and E.~Stein in the flat Euclidean setting.

AI.tldr: 利用Riesz变换在Ahlfors正则集上刻画Hardy空间H¹和BMO空间，推广了Fefferman-Stein的经典结果。
AI.motivation: 研究Riesz变换如何描述ℝⁿ中集合的几何性质，并探索其在函数空间刻画中的应用，特别是在非平坦几何结构上的推广。
AI.techniques: 使用Riesz变换作为分析工具，在具有小振荡的Ahlfors正则集上工作，通过向外单位法向量的BMO性质量化几何振荡。
AI.main_theorems: 在Ahlfors正则集上建立了Hardy空间H¹和John-Nirenberg空间BMO的Riesz变换刻画，推广了Fefferman-Stein在平坦欧氏空间中的经典结果。
AI.significance: 将经典的Fefferman-Stein理论推广到更一般的几何设置，为在非平坦结构上研究函数空间提供了新工具，连接了几何测度论与调和分析。

title: Concentrating solutions of nonlinear Schr\"odinger systems with mixed   interactions
summary:
In this paper we study the existence of solutions to nonlinear Schr\"odinger
systems with mixed couplings of attractive and repulsive forces, which arise
from the models in Bose-Einstein condensates and nonlinear optics. In
particular, we build solutions whose first component has one bump and the other
components have several peaks forming a regular polygon around the single bump
of the first component.

AI.tldr: 研究具有吸引-排斥混合耦合的非线性薛定谔系统，构造第一分量单峰而其他分量多峰形成正多边形结构的解
AI.motivation: 研究来自玻色-爱因斯坦凝聚和非线性光学中的非线性薛定谔系统，该系统具有吸引和排斥力的混合耦合，需要构造具有特定空间结构的解
AI.techniques: 变分方法、Lyapunov-Schmidt约化、临界点理论、正则多边形几何结构分析
AI.main_theorems: 构造第一分量具有单个峰、其他分量具有多个峰且围绕第一分量峰形成正多边形结构的解的存在性定理
AI.significance: 为具有混合耦合的非线性薛定谔系统提供了新的解结构，深化了对多分量玻色-爱因斯坦凝聚和非线性光学系统中空间模式形成的理解

title: On Exponents of Thickness in Geometry Rigidity Inequality for Shells
summary:
We study exponents of thickness in Frieseck-James-M\"uller's inequalities for
shells. We derive the following results: (a) the exponent of thickness
$\mu(S)\leq15/8$ if the middle surface $S$ is parabolic; (b) the exponent of
thickness $\mu(S)\leq11/6$ if the middle surface $S$ is a minimal surface with
negative curvature; (c) the exponent of thickness $\mu(S)\leq11/6$ if the
middle surface $S$ is a ruled surface with negative curvature. The exponents of
thickness in Frieseck-James-M\"uller's inequalities for thin shells represent
the relationship between rigidity and thickness $h$ of a shell when the large
deformations take place, i. e., the rigidity of the shell related to the
thickness $h$ is $$Ch^{\mu(S)}.$$ Thus the above results of $\mu(S)<2$ show
that those shells are strictly more rigid than plates since $\mu(S)=2$ for
plates. Moreover, we present another result which shows that when $\mu(S)<2,$
any $W^{2,2}$ isometry of the middle surface is rigid.

AI.tldr: 该论文改进了薄壳Frieseck-James-Müller不等式中的厚度指数上界，证明了特定曲面类型壳体的刚度严格大于平板。
AI.motivation: 研究薄壳在发生大变形时刚度与厚度之间的关系，特别是通过Frieseck-James-Müller不等式中的厚度指数μ(S)来量化这种关系，旨在证明某些曲面类型的壳体比平板更刚性。
AI.techniques: 使用几何分析方法和Frieseck-James-Müller不等式框架，针对不同类型的曲面（抛物面、负曲率极小曲面、负曲率直纹面）分别推导厚度指数的上界估计。
AI.main_theorems: (a) 抛物面中间曲面S的厚度指数μ(S)≤15/8；(b) 负曲率极小曲面中间曲面S的厚度指数μ(S)≤11/6；(c) 负曲率直纹面中间曲面S的厚度指数μ(S)≤11/6；并证明当μ(S)<2时，中间曲面的任何W^{2,2}等距变换都是刚性的。
AI.significance: 这些结果首次给出了特定曲面类型壳体厚度指数的具体上界，证明了这些壳体比平板（μ=2）更刚性，为薄壳力学和弹性理论提供了重要的理论依据，对结构工程中的壳体设计有指导意义。

title: Some general external forces and critical mild solutions for the   fractional Navier-Stokes equations
summary:
In this article we study mild solutions for the forced, incompressible
fractional Navier-Stokes equations. These solutions are classically obtained
via a fixed-point argument which relies on suitable estimates for the initial
data, the nonlinearity and the external forces. Many functional spaces can be
considered, however we are mainly interested here in a critical setting which
ensures the existence of global solutions. We give some examples of such
critical functional spaces and we discuss their relationship with generic
external forces.

AI.tldr: 研究分数阶Navier-Stokes方程在临界空间中的全局温和解存在性
AI.motivation: 研究带有外力的不可压缩分数阶Navier-Stokes方程的温和解，特别关注临界空间框架下的全局解存在性问题
AI.techniques: 使用不动点定理，基于初始数据、非线性和外力的适当估计，在临界函数空间中构造解
AI.main_theorems: 给出了临界函数空间的例子，讨论了这些空间与一般外力的关系，证明了在临界设置下全局解的存在性
AI.significance: 扩展了分数阶Navier-Stokes方程解理论，为研究这类方程在临界空间中的适定性提供了理论框架

title: Nonlinear multidomain model for nerve bundles with random structure
summary:
We present a derivation of a multidomain model for the electric potential in
bundles of randomly distributed axons with different radii. The FitzHugh-Nagumo
dynamics is assumed on the axons' membrane, and the conductivity depends
nonlinearly on the electric field. Under ergodicity conditions, we study the
asymptotic behavior of the potential in the bundle when the number of the axons
in the bundle is sufficiently large and derive a macroscopic multidomain model
describing the electrical activity of the bundle. Due to the randomness of
geometry, the effective intracellular potential is not deterministic but is
shown to be a stationary function with realizations that are constant on axons'
cross sections. The technique combines the stochastic two-scale convergence and
the method of monotone operators.

AI.tldr: 提出了随机分布轴突束中电位的多域模型，结合非线性电导和FitzHugh-Nagumo动力学，通过随机双尺度收敛和单调算子方法推导宏观模型。
AI.motivation: 研究神经轴突束中电信号传播的数学模型，考虑轴突半径随机分布、非线性电导和FitzHugh-Nagumo膜动力学的复杂情况，旨在从微观随机结构推导宏观连续模型。
AI.techniques: 随机双尺度收敛方法、单调算子理论、遍历性条件、渐近分析、多域建模技术。
AI.main_theorems: 在遍历性条件下，当轴突数量足够大时，证明了电位分布的渐近行为，推导出描述轴突束电活动的宏观多域模型，并证明有效细胞内电位是平稳函数且在轴突横截面上为常数。
AI.significance: 为神经组织电信号传播提供了更真实的数学模型，考虑了随机几何和非线性效应，对理解神经传导、癫痫等神经疾病机制有重要意义，也为生物医学工程中的神经刺激技术提供理论支持。

title: Chernoff solutions of the heat and the Schr\"odinger equation in the   Heisenberg group
summary:
This paper investigates the application of the classical Chernoff's theorem
to construct explicit solutions for the heat and Schr\"odinger equations on the
Heisenberg group $\mathbb{H}^d$. Using semigroup approximation techniques, we
obtain analytically tractable and numerically implementable representations of
fundamental solutions. In particular, we establish a new connection between the
heat equation and Brownian motion on $\mathbb{H}^d$ and provide a rigorous
realization of the Feynman path integral for the Schr\"odinger equation. The
study highlights the challenges posed by the noncommutative structure of the
Heisenberg group and opens new directions for PDEs on sub-Riemannian manifolds.

AI.tldr: 应用Chernoff定理构造海森堡群上热方程和薛定谔方程的显式解，建立热方程与布朗运动的新联系，并实现薛定谔方程的费曼路径积分严格表述。
AI.motivation: 研究海森堡群上的偏微分方程，特别是热方程和薛定谔方程，由于海森堡群的非交换结构给传统分析方法带来挑战，需要发展新的数学工具来构造显式解并理解其与随机过程的联系。
AI.techniques: 使用经典的Chernoff定理和半群逼近技术，结合海森堡群的几何结构，发展数值可实现的解表示方法，建立与布朗运动的联系并实现费曼路径积分的严格数学表述。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 构造海森堡群上热方程和薛定谔方程的显式解析解；2. 建立热方程与海森堡群上布朗运动的新联系；3. 提供薛定谔方程费曼路径积分的严格数学实现；4. 发展数值可实现的解表示方法。
AI.significance: 为亚黎曼流形上的偏微分方程研究开辟新方向，为非交换几何中的方程求解提供新方法，连接了分析、几何和概率论，对数学物理和随机分析有重要理论意义。

title: The well-posedness and convergence of higher-order Hartree equations in   critical Sobolev spaces on $\mathbb{T}^3$
summary:
In this article, we consider Hartree equations generalised to $2p+1$ order
nonlinearities. These equations arise in the study of the mean-field limits of
Bose gases with $p$-body interactions. We study their well-posedness properties
in $H^{s_c}(\mathbb{T}^3)$, where $\mathbb{T}^3$ is the three dimensional torus
and $s_c = 3/2 - 1/p$ is the scaling-critical regularity. The convergence of
solutions of the Hartree equation to solutions of the nonlinear Schr\"odinger
equation is proved. We also consider the case of mixed nonlinearities, proving
local well-posedness in $s_c$ by considering the problem as a perturbation of
the higher-order Hartree equation. In the particular case of the (defocusing)
quintic-cubic Hartree equation, we also prove global well-posedness for all
initial conditions in $H^1(\mathbb{T}^3)$. This is done by viewing it as a
perturbation of the local quintic NLS.

AI.tldr: 研究了具有2p+1阶非线性项的广义Hartree方程在三维环面上的适定性问题，包括局部适定性、全局适定性以及与非线性薛定谔方程的收敛关系。
AI.motivation: 研究具有p体相互作用的玻色气体的平均场极限，对应的广义Hartree方程具有2p+1阶非线性项，需要分析其在三维环面T^3上的适定性性质。
AI.techniques: 使用尺度临界正则性s_c=3/2-1/p的分析框架，将混合非线性问题视为高阶Hartree方程的扰动，通过扰动理论处理局部适定性，对于全局适定性则视为局部五次NLS的扰动。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 在尺度临界正则性H^{s_c}(T^3)中证明局部适定性；2. 证明Hartree方程解收敛到非线性薛定谔方程解；3. 对于混合非线性（五次-三次Hartree方程）证明所有H^1(T^3)初值的全局适定性。
AI.significance: 为具有多体相互作用的量子系统平均场极限提供了严格的数学基础，建立了广义Hartree方程与NLS之间的联系，发展了处理混合非线性Hartree方程的扰动方法。

title: Adaptive finite element approximation for quasi-static crack growth
summary:
We provide an adaptive finite element approximation for a model of
quasi-static crack growth in dimension two. The discrete setting consists of
integral functionals that are defined on continuous, piecewise affine
functions, where the triangulation is a part of the unknown of the problem and
adaptive in each minimization step. The limit passage is conducted
simultaneously in the vanishing mesh size and discretized time step, and
results in an evolution for the continuum Griffith model of brittle fracture
with isotropic surface energy [FriedrichSolombrino16] which is characterized by
an irreversibility condition, a global stability, and an energy balance. Our
result corresponds to an evolutionary counterpart of the static
Gamma-convergence result in [BabadjianBonhomme23] for which, as a byproduct, we
provide an alternative proof.

AI.tldr: 提出了二维准静态裂纹生长的自适应有限元逼近方法，建立了离散模型到连续Griffith断裂模型的演化Gamma收敛结果
AI.motivation: 研究准静态裂纹生长问题的数值逼近，建立离散自适应有限元方法与连续Griffith断裂模型之间的数学联系，解决裂纹演化问题的数值分析理论框架
AI.techniques: 自适应有限元方法、Gamma收敛理论、离散时间步进、积分泛函变分、网格自适应策略、同时极限分析（网格尺寸和时间步长趋于零）
AI.main_theorems: 建立了离散自适应有限元模型到连续Griffith断裂模型的演化Gamma收敛结果，证明了离散解收敛到满足不可逆性条件、全局稳定性和能量平衡的裂纹演化
AI.significance: 为断裂力学的数值模拟提供了严格的数学基础，建立了自适应有限元方法与连续模型之间的桥梁，同时为静态Gamma收敛结果提供了替代证明，推动了计算断裂力学理论发展

title: Fractional elliptic reaction-diffusion systems with coupled gradient   terms and different diffusion
summary:
In this work, we study the existence and nonexistence of nonnegative
solutions to a class of nonlocal elliptic systems set in a bounded open subset
of $\mathbb{R}^N$. The diffusion operators are of type $u_i\mapsto
d_i(-\Delta)^{s_i}u_i$ where $0<s_1\neq s_2<1$, and the gradients of the
unknowns act as source terms. Existence results are obtained by proving some
fine estimates when data belong to weighted Lebesgue spaces. Those estimates
are new and interesting in themselves.

AI.tldr: 研究非局部椭圆型系统在加权Lebesgue空间中的存在性与非存在性结果
AI.motivation: 研究ℝ^N中有界开集上的一类非局部椭圆型系统，其中扩散算子包含不同阶数的分数阶Laplacian，且未知函数的梯度作为源项，探讨非负解的存在性与非存在性条件
AI.techniques: 使用加权Lebesgue空间理论，建立精细的估计（fine estimates），这些估计本身具有独立的理论价值
AI.main_theorems: 获得了当数据属于加权Lebesgue空间时非负解的存在性结果，并建立了新的精细估计
AI.significance: 为包含不同分数阶扩散算子的椭圆型系统提供了新的分析框架，所建立的精细估计对非局部椭圆方程理论有独立贡献

title: On a mixed problem for the nonstationary Stokes system in an angle
summary:
The autor considers an initial-boundary value problem for the nonstationary
Stokes system in an angle, where Dirichlet and Neumann conditions are
prescribed on the diferent sides of the angle. The major part of the paper
deals with the parameter-depending problem which arises after the application
of the Laplace transform. The author obtains existence, uniqueness and
regularity results for this problem in a class of weighted Sobolev spaces.
Using the properties of the Laplace transform, he proves the existence and
uniqueness of strong solutions of the time-dependent problem.

AI.tldr: 在角域中研究非定常Stokes系统的初边值问题，获得加权Sobolev空间中的存在性、唯一性和正则性结果
AI.motivation: 研究角域中非定常Stokes系统的初边值问题，其中角的不同边上分别施加Dirichlet和Neumann边界条件，这类问题在流体力学和奇异域问题中具有重要意义
AI.techniques: 主要使用Laplace变换将时间相关问题转化为参数依赖问题，在加权Sobolev空间中进行分析，利用椭圆型偏微分方程理论和函数空间方法
AI.main_theorems: 获得了参数依赖问题的存在性、唯一性和正则性结果，进而证明了时间依赖问题的强解存在唯一性
AI.significance: 为角域中具有混合边界条件的Stokes系统提供了严格数学理论，扩展了奇异域中流体力学问题的分析框架，对理解角点附近的流体行为有重要意义

title: The structure of fully nonlinear equations and its applications to   prescribed problems on complete conformal metrics
comment:
This manuscript combines and extends arXiv:2011.08580,
  arXiv:2203.13212 and arXiv:2304.12835, with improved structural conditions
  and stronger results. It replaces the previous versions
summary:
This paper investigates the structure of fully nonlinear equations and their
applications to geometric problems. We solve some fully nonlinear version of
the Loewner-Nirenberg and Yamabe problems. Notably, we introduce Morse theory
techniques to construct admissible metrics under a weak condition on the
underlying metric, which can be further relaxed in a broad setting.
Furthermore, we provide some topological obstruction to demonstrate the
optimality of our structural conditions.

AI.tldr: 该论文通过引入Morse理论技术解决了完全非线性版本的Loewner-Nirenberg和Yamabe问题，在弱条件下构造了容许度量。
AI.motivation: 研究完全非线性方程的结构及其在几何问题中的应用，特别是解决完全非线性版本的经典几何分析问题（Loewner-Nirenberg和Yamabe问题），这些问题是几何分析和偏微分方程领域的重要课题。
AI.techniques: 引入Morse理论技术来构造容许度量，在底层度量的弱条件下工作，并在更广泛的设置中进一步放宽条件；同时使用拓扑障碍方法来证明结构条件的最优性。
AI.main_theorems: 解决了完全非线性版本的Loewner-Nirenberg和Yamabe问题；在弱条件下构造了容许度量；提供了拓扑障碍来证明结构条件的最优性。
AI.significance: 将Morse理论技术应用于完全非线性几何问题，扩展了经典几何分析问题的研究框架，为完全非线性方程在几何中的应用提供了新的方法和理论工具，具有重要的理论意义。

title: On the singular limit of Brinkman's law to Darcy's law
summary:
In this paper we study singular limits of congestion-averse growth models,
connecting different models describing the effect of congestion. These models
arise in particular in the context of tissue growth. The main ingredient of our
analysis is a family of energy evolution equations and their dissipation
structures, which are novel and of independent interest. This strategy allows
us to consider a larger family of pressure laws as well as proving the joint
limit, from a compressible Brinkman's model to the incompressible Darcy's law,
where the latter is a Hele-Shaw type free boundary problem.

AI.tldr: 该论文通过能量演化方程和耗散结构，建立了拥堵厌恶增长模型的奇异极限，连接了从可压缩Brinkman模型到不可压缩Darcy定律的联合极限。
AI.motivation: 研究拥堵厌恶增长模型的奇异极限，特别关注组织生长背景下的模型，旨在连接描述拥堵效应的不同数学模型，理解从可压缩到不可压缩流动的极限行为。
AI.techniques: 主要使用能量演化方程和耗散结构的分析框架，通过能量方法处理奇异极限问题，考虑更广泛的压力定律，建立从Brinkman模型到Darcy定律的联合极限。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了从可压缩Brinkman模型到不可压缩Darcy定律的联合极限，后者是Hele-Shaw型自由边界问题；建立了能量演化方程及其耗散结构，这些结构具有独立的理论价值。
AI.significance: 为组织生长等生物物理过程提供了统一的数学模型框架，能量演化方程和耗散结构的方法具有普适性，可应用于更广泛的压力定律和奇异极限问题。

title: Existence, uniqueness and regularity for elliptic $p$-Laplace systems   with complex coefficients
summary:
This paper concerns elliptic systems of $p$-Laplace type with complex valued
coefficient and source term. We extend the real valued theory of the elliptic
$p$-Laplace equation to the complex valued case. We establish the existence and
uniqueness of solutions to the Dirichlet problem and prove the Schauder
estimate in the case of H\"older continuous coefficients and source terms. We
also consider families of coefficient functions parametrized by a complex
variable and prove a differentiability result for the map taking the complex
parameter to the corresponding solution.

AI.tldr: 将实值p-Laplace方程的椭圆理论推广到复值情形，建立Dirichlet问题解的存在唯一性、Schauder估计以及关于复参数解映射的可微性
AI.motivation: 研究具有复值系数和源项的p-Laplace型椭圆系统，将实值p-Laplace方程的已有理论推广到复值情形，填补复值椭圆系统理论空白
AI.techniques: 椭圆正则性理论、Schauder估计方法、复变函数分析、参数依赖椭圆方程理论、不动点方法或变分方法
AI.main_theorems: 1) Dirichlet问题解的存在唯一性定理；2) 系数和源项Hölder连续时的Schauder估计；3) 复参数化系数族对应的解映射可微性结果
AI.significance: 扩展了p-Laplace方程理论到复值域，为复值椭圆系统分析提供理论基础，在复分析、数学物理和工程应用中有潜在价值
